name: Countryhumans ROAD TRIP!
description:
ONE VAN. WAY TOO MANY NATIONS.

Hello, user! I have created for you a simple countryhuman bot, featuring countries from across the world and many more. You may roleplay as a country, yourself or even an OC!

I’m not too sure if this is safe for work or anything...

Anyways, I don’t have much to describe about this bot, so have fun!

Oh, and one more thing. Anything I got wrong or any bugs you find? Tell me. I’ll handle it.
creator: XILAROS_343
